commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh Behold, I will rebuke your offspring, and spread refuse upon your faces, even the refuse of your solemn feasts; and one shall take you away with it. I will cast away the shoulder, which in the law was appointed to be your portion, and fling it at you in my anger: and will reject both you and your festivals like dung. (Challoner) Hebrew now reads for shoulder, zerah, "grain "or seed. (Calmet) "I will menace you with the shoulder, and will spread dirt on your faces, even the dirt of your feasts "(Aquila) or "the ventricle of your festivals. "(Septuagint) (Haydock).

commentaries.author: Richard Challoner
commentaries.content: I will cast the shoulder to you: I will cast away the shoulder, which in the law was appointed to be your portion, and fling it at you in my anger: and will reject both you and your festivals like dung.
